impacts: source_kind tagging -> infer from caller/context and hide unless diagnostic
idempotency -> server-derived retry receipt with replay-only hint
feedback events -> shadow capture diagnostics only
automated audit -> append silently warn only on failure
tombstone delete -> regular delete soft-deletes idempotently
stale-exclusion -> active default with omission diagnostics on demand
